---
title: "My Personal Website"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
---

### About me

I'm currently a 2nd-year master's student in Biostatistics at Columbia University. 

<img src="images/photo_me.jpg" style="width:30%">

Throughout my academic learning, I have developed a strong foundation in SAS, R, Python programming and statistical methods.

### Experience

* [Academic](academic.html)

### Homework #4

* [Dashboard](dashboard.html)
